+fn checkout(args: &[String]) {                                                 
+    let repo_path = Path::new(MINIGIT_DIR);                                    
+    if !repo_path.exists() {                                                   
+        eprintln!("Not a minigit repository (missing .minigit directory)");    
+        return;                                                                
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    let index_path = repo_path.join(INDEX_FILE);                               
+                                                                               
+    if args.len() < 2 {                                                        
+        eprintln!("Usage: minigit checkout <commit>");                         
+        return;                                                                
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    let commit_file = repo_path.join(format!("commit_{}.txt", args[1]));       
+    if !commit_file.exists() {                                                 
+        eprintln!("Commit not found");                                         
+        return;                                                                
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    let commit_content = fs::read_to_string(&commit_file).expect("Failed to    
read commit file");                                                             
+                                                                               
+    for line in commit_content.lines().skip(2) {                               
+        let parts: Vec<&str> = line.split_whitespace().collect();              
+        if parts.len() != 2 {                                                  
+            continue;                                                          
+        }                                                                      
+        let file_path = Path::new(parts[0]);                                   
+        let content = parts[1];                                                
+                                                                               
+        if !file_path.exists() {                                               
+            eprintln!("File not found: {}", file_path.display());              
+            continue;                                                          
+        }                                                                      
+                                                                               
+        fs::write(file_path, content).expect("Failed to write file");          
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    println!("Checked out commit: {}", args[1]);                               
+}                                                                              
+                                                                               
+fn reset(args: &[String]) {                                                    
+    let repo_path = Path::new(MINIGIT_DIR);                                    
+    if !repo_path.exists() {                                                   
+        eprintln!("Not a minigit repository (missing .minigit directory)");    
+        return;                                                                
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    let index_path = repo_path.join(INDEX_FILE);                               
+                                                                               
+    if args.len() < 2 {                                                        
+        eprintln!("Usage: minigit reset <commit>");                            
+        return;                                                                
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    let commit_file = repo_path.join(format!("commit_{}.txt", args[1]));       
+    if !commit_file.exists() {                                                 
+        eprintln!("Commit not found");                                         
+        return;                                                                
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    fs::remove_file(&index_path).expect("Failed to remove index file");        
+                                                                               
+    for line in fs::read_to_string(&commit_file).expect("Failed to read commit 
file").lines().skip(2) {                                                        
+        let parts: Vec<&str> = line.split_whitespace().collect();              
+        if parts.len() != 2 {                                                  
+            continue;                                                          
+        }                                                                      
+        let file_path = Path::new(parts[0]);                                   
+                                                                               
+        if !file_path.exists() {                                               
+            eprintln!("File not found: {}", file_path.display());              
+            continue;                                                          
+        }                                                                      
+                                                                               
+        fs::remove_file(file_path).expect("Failed to remove file");            
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    println!("Reset to commit: {}", args[1]);                                  
+}
